igbo.solve_your_first_challenge: Dozie ihe ịma aka mbụ gị
igbo.solve_5_basic_grid_challenges: Dozie ihe ịma aka grid bụ isi 5
igbo.solve_challenges_in_all_4_modes: Dozie ihe ịma aka na ụzọ 4 niile
igbo.skip_count_overlay_multiplication_as_r: 🔢 Ihe mkpuchi ọgụgụ-awụli (ịba ụba = mgbakwunye ugboro ugboro)
igbo.distributive_property_a_b_c_a_b_a_c: 💡 Àgwà nkesa: a × (b + c) = a×b + a×c
igbo.break_multi_digit_numbers_into_tens_an: 💡 Kewaa ọnụọgụ ọtụtụ-ọnụọgụ ka ọ bụrụ iri na otu, baa ụzọ ọ bụla ụba, mgbe ahụ tinye!
igbo.the_grid_is_the_picture_multiplication: Grid bụ foto. Ịba ụba bụ mgbakọ.
igbo.pick_a_story_look_at_the_matching_grid: Họrọ akụkọ. Lee grid dakọtara. Ịba ụba bụ ịgụ ihe n'ime akụkụ anọ. Idozi 5 na-enye baajị 📝 Onye Anwansi Nsogbu Okwu.
igbo.reset_all_dimensions_and_challenges: Tọgharịa akụkụ niile na ihe ịma aka
igbo.basic_grid_multiplication_as_area: Grid Bụ Isi — ịba ụba dị ka mpaghara
igbo.a_b_is_the_area_of_an_a_by_b_rectangle: a × b bụ mpaghara akụkụ anọ a na b. Nke a bụ àkwà mmiri site na ọgụgụ-awụli ruo na ịba ụba. Common Core 3.MD.7: jikọọ mpaghara na ịba ụba na mgbakwunye.
igbo.distributive_split_the_rectangle_keep_: Nkesa — kewaa akụkụ anọ, debe mpaghara
igbo.a_b_c_ab_ac_cut_a_4_7_grid_into_a_4_5_: a(b+c) = ab + ac. Bee grid 4×7 ka ọ bụrụ 4×5 + 4×2; otu mkpokọta. Àgwà nkesa bụ ọkpụkpụ azụ algebra nke mgbasawanye ọ bụla na-esote. Common Core 3.OA.5.
igbo.partial_products_23_47_made_visible: Ngwaahịa Akụkụ — emere 23 × 47 ka ọ pụta ìhè
igbo.break_factors_by_place_value_23_47_20_: Kewaa ihe nrụpụta site na uru ọnọdụ: 23×47 = (20+3)(40+7) = 800 + 140 + 120 + 21 = 1081. Àkwà mmiri ruo n'ụzọ lattice, mgbe ahụ algọridim ọkọlọtọ. Common Core 4.NBT.5.
igbo.a_garden_with_4_rows_of_6_plants_a_the: Ubi nwere ahịrị 4 nke osisi 6. Ụlọ ihe nkiri nwere ahịrị 8 nke oche 12. Eziokwu ịba ụba ọ bụla na-ebi n'ime akụkụ anọ nke ụwa eziokwu. Common Core 3.OA.3, 4.OA.2.
igbo.b_d_p_w_switch_mode_n_new_challenge_c_: ⌨️ B/D/P/W: gbanwee ụzọ | N: ihe ịma aka ọhụrụ | C: nkwekọrịta | ?: onye nkuzi AI
igbo.sliders_for_rows_cols_discrete_4_state: Slaịda maka ahịrị × kọlụm. Nkewa dị iche nke ọnọdụ 4. Enweghị akara, enweghị ngosipụta.
igbo.hypothesis_when_does_area_rows_cols: Echiche: kedu mgbe mpaghara = ahịrị + kọlụm?
igbo.stuck_show_open_prompts: 🤔 Ị rapaara — gosi ajụjụ mepere emepe
igbo.find_sizes_where_area_perimeter_rare_i: Chọta ụhara ebe mpaghara = gburugburu (ọnụọgụ zuru oke na-adịghị ahụkebe).
igbo.when_does_swapping_rows_cols_change_an: Kedu mgbe ịgbanwe ahịrị/kọlụm na-agbanwe ihe ọ bụla?
igbo.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Aghọtara m — kọwaa n'okwu nke m
igbo.explain_commutative_property_area_leng: Kọwaa àgwà nkwekọrịta + mpaghara = ogologo × obosara.
igbo.design_note_discrete_4_state_classific: Ihe ndetu imewe: nkewa dị iche nke ọnọdụ 4; enweghị akara ule mpaghara; enweghị ngosipụta — n'ụzọ ngwaa.

kinyarwanda.skip_count_overlay_multiplication_as_r: 🔢 Urwego rwo kubara usimbuka (kugwiza = kongera incuro nyinshi)
kinyarwanda.distributive_property_a_b_c_a_b_a_c: 💡 Imiterere yo kugabanya: a × (b + c) = a×b + a×c
kinyarwanda.break_multi_digit_numbers_into_tens_an: 💡 Tandukanya imibare myinshi mu makumyabiri n'imwe, ugwize buri kabiri, hanyuma wongere!
kinyarwanda.b_per_row_per_group: B (kuri buri murongo / kuri buri tsinda)
kinyarwanda.the_grid_is_the_picture_multiplication: Urusobe ni ifoto. Kugwiza ni imibare.
kinyarwanda.pick_a_story_look_at_the_matching_grid: Hitamo inkuru. Reba urusobe ruhuye. Kugwiza ni ukubara ibintu mu kayira k'impande enye. Gukemura 5 bituma ubona ikirango 📝 Umurozi w'Ibibazo by'Amagambo.
kinyarwanda.a_b_is_the_area_of_an_a_by_b_rectangle: a × b ni ubuso bw'akayira k'impande enye a na b. Iyi ni ikiraro kuva ku kubara usimbuka kugera ku kugwiza. Common Core 3.MD.7: huza ubuso no kugwiza no kongera.
kinyarwanda.distributive_split_the_rectangle_keep_: Kugabanya — tandukanya akayira k'impande enye, ubike ubuso
kinyarwanda.a_b_c_ab_ac_cut_a_4_7_grid_into_a_4_5_: a(b+c) = ab + ac. Ca urusobe rwa 4×7 mu 4×5 + 4×2; igiteranyo kimwe. Imiterere yo kugabanya ni urutirigongo rwa algebra rw'aguka kose gukurikira. Common Core 3.OA.5.
kinyarwanda.break_factors_by_place_value_23_47_20_: Tandukanya ibice ukurikije agaciro k'umwanya: 23×47 = (20+3)(40+7) = 800 + 140 + 120 + 21 = 1081. Ikiraro kigana uburyo bw'urusobe, hanyuma algorithm isanzwe. Common Core 4.NBT.5.
kinyarwanda.a_garden_with_4_rows_of_6_plants_a_the: Ubusitani bufite imirongo 4 y'ibimera 6. Ikinamico gifite imirongo 8 y'intebe 12. Buri kuri kw'ukuri kugwiza kubaho mu kayira k'impande enye k'isi nyayo. Common Core 3.OA.3, 4.OA.2.
kinyarwanda.b_d_p_w_switch_mode_n_new_challenge_c_: ⌨️ B/D/P/W: hindura uburyo | N: ikibazo gishya | C: guhinduranya | ?: umwarimu wa AI
kinyarwanda.distributive_property_a_b_c_ab_ac: 🔢 Imiterere yo kugabanya — a(b+c) = ab + ac
kinyarwanda.sliders_for_rows_cols_discrete_4_state: Inyereza z'imirongo × inkingi. Icyiciro gitandukanye cy'imiterere 4. Nta manota, nta kugaragaza.
kinyarwanda.hypothesis_when_does_area_rows_cols: Igitekerezo: ni ryari ubuso = imirongo + inkingi?
kinyarwanda.find_sizes_where_area_perimeter_rare_i: Shaka ingano aho ubuso = umuzenguruko (imibare yuzuye idasanzwe).
kinyarwanda.when_does_swapping_rows_cols_change_an: Ni ryari guhinduranya imirongo/inkingi bihindura ikintu?
kinyarwanda.explain_commutative_property_area_leng: Sobanura imiterere yo guhinduranya + ubuso = uburebure × ubugari.
kinyarwanda.design_note_discrete_4_state_classific: Inyandiko y'igishushanyo: icyiciro gitandukanye cy'imiterere 4; nta manota y'ikizamini cy'ubuso; nta kugaragaza — ku bushake.

lingala.solve_your_first_challenge: Silisa mokakatano na yo ya liboso
lingala.solve_5_basic_grid_challenges: Silisa mikakatano 5 ya grid ya moboko
lingala.skip_count_overlay_multiplication_as_r: 🔢 Etanda ya botángi-bopumbwa (bofuli = bobakisi mbala na mbala)
lingala.distributive_property_a_b_c_a_b_a_c: 💡 Ezaleli ya bokaboli: a × (b + c) = a×b + a×c
lingala.areamodel_data_table: tabló ya ba-données ya modɛlɛ ya etando
lingala.break_multi_digit_numbers_into_tens_an: 💡 Kabolá mituya ya mituya mingi na zómi mpe mɔ̌kɔ, fulá liboké mɔ́kɔ mɔ́kɔ, na nsima bakisá!
lingala.b_per_row_per_group: B (na molɔ́ngɔ́ mɔ́kɔ mɔ́kɔ / na etuluku mɔ́kɔ mɔ́kɔ)
lingala.the_grid_is_the_picture_multiplication: Grid ezali elilingi. Bofuli ezali matematiki.
lingala.pick_a_story_look_at_the_matching_grid: Poná lisoló. Talá grid oyo ekokani. Bofuli ezali kotánga biloko na kati ya carré ya bangámbo mínei. Kosilisa 5 epesi elembo 📝 Nganga ya Mikakatano ya Maloba.
lingala.ai_area_model_tutor: 🤖 Molakisi ya AI ya Modɛlɛ ya Etando
lingala.close_ai_tutor_panel: Kanga karré ya molakisi ya AI
lingala.ask_about_area_models: Tuná na ntina ya ba-modɛlɛ ya etando...
lingala.ask_the_area_model_tutor: Tuná molakisi ya modɛlɛ ya etando
lingala.basic_grid_multiplication_as_area: Grid ya Moboko — bofuli lokola etando
lingala.a_b_is_the_area_of_an_a_by_b_rectangle: a × b ezali etando ya carré ya bangámbo mínei a na b. Oyo ezali gbagba kobanda na botángi-bopumbwa tii na bofuli. Common Core 3.MD.7: kangisá etando na bofuli mpe bobakisi.
lingala.distributive_split_the_rectangle_keep_: Bokaboli — kabolá carré ya bangámbo mínei, bómba etando
lingala.a_b_c_ab_ac_cut_a_4_7_grid_into_a_4_5_: a(b+c) = ab + ac. Katá grid ya 4×7 na 4×5 + 4×2; bokutani moko. Ezaleli ya bokaboli ezali mokongo ya algèbre ya bofungwami nyonso oyo elandi. Common Core 3.OA.5.
lingala.break_factors_by_place_value_23_47_20_: Kabolá ba-eyimisi na motúya ya esika: 23×47 = (20+3)(40+7) = 800 + 140 + 120 + 21 = 1081. Gbagba na lolenge ya lattice, na nsima algorithme ya momeseno. Common Core 4.NBT.5.
lingala.word_problems_multiplication_in_the_wo: Mikakatano ya Maloba — bofuli na mokili
lingala.a_garden_with_4_rows_of_6_plants_a_the: Elanga na milɔ́ngɔ́ 4 ya milona 6. Théâtre na milɔ́ngɔ́ 8 ya bakiti 12. Solo nyonso ya bofuli efandi na kati ya carré ya bangámbo mínei ya mokili ya solo. Common Core 3.OA.3, 4.OA.2.
lingala.b_d_p_w_switch_mode_n_new_challenge_c_: ⌨️ B/D/P/W: bóngola ndenge | N: mokakatano ya sika | C: bobongoli | ?: molakisi ya AI
lingala.distributive_property_a_b_c_ab_ac: 🔢 Ezaleli ya bokaboli — a(b+c) = ab + ac
lingala.special_case_area_perimeter_sum: ✨ Likambo ya ndingbó (etando = bokutani ya zíngazínga)
lingala.standard_rectangle: 🟩 Carré ya momeseno ya bangámbo mínei
lingala.sliders_for_rows_cols_discrete_4_state: Ba-slider ya milɔ́ngɔ́ × makonzí. Bokaboli ya kokesana ya bizaleli 4. Manota tɛ́, komonisa tɛ́.
lingala.hypothesis_when_does_area_rows_cols: Likanisi: ntango nini etando = milɔ́ngɔ́ + makonzí?
lingala.find_sizes_where_area_perimeter_rare_i: Lukáká bonene esika etando = zíngazínga (mituya mobimba ya mwa).
lingala.when_does_swapping_rows_cols_change_an: Ntango nini bobongoli ya milɔ́ngɔ́/makonzí ebongoli eloko?
lingala.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Nasosoli — limbolá na maloba na ngai
lingala.explain_commutative_property_area_leng: Limbolá ezaleli ya bobongoli + etando = molai × monene.
lingala.design_note_discrete_4_state_classific: Note ya bokeli: bokaboli ya kokesana ya bizaleli 4; manota ya komeka etando tɛ́; komonisa tɛ́ — na nko.
